scope.summary: Migrate 7 remaining SFFMC plugins (memory, rules, watchdog, max-mode, auto-max, compose, workflow) from their custom `loadConfig` + `PluginContext` definitions to the canonical `@sffmc/shared` SDK. Currently only eos-stripper, log-whitelist, and health use @sffmc/shared. After migration all 10 packages share one config-loading contract, one PluginContext type, and one EventBus — eliminating ~150 LOC of duplicated code and making future plugins trivial to scaffold.
success_criteria: All 7 plugins import `loadConfig` from `@sffmc/shared` (no local definitions remain)
All 7 plugins use the shared `PluginContext` type (no local interfaces)
Each migrated plugin still passes its existing test suite (0 regressions)
Pre-commit hook (test + typecheck + sffmc_health) stays green after each plugin migration
No plugin version bumps unless API surface changes (semver stays at 0.1.0)

steps.title: Audit per-plugin config shape (memory)
steps.detail: Read packages/memory/src/index.ts:39-77. Document defaultConfig keys (storagePath, reconBudgets, memoryPaths, defaultImportance) and config file path. Note any behavior that diverges from shared loadConfig (e.g. config-on-startup timing).

steps.title: Audit per-plugin config shape (rules)
steps.detail: Read packages/rules/src/index.ts. Rules uses YAML gate-based allow/deny. Verify whether loadConfig is invoked per-request or per-startup.

steps.title: Audit per-plugin config shape (watchdog)
steps.detail: Read packages/watchdog/src/index.ts:25-44. Watchdog loads YAML threshold, rolling_window, promote_model, error_class_filter, log_failures. Check if it depends on ctx.config.model fallback.

steps.title: Audit per-plugin config shape (max-mode + auto-max)
steps.detail: Read packages/max-mode/src/index.ts:27-45 and packages/auto-max/src/index.ts:25-48. Both have similar shape. Note any plugin-specific additions.

steps.title: Audit per-plugin config shape (compose + workflow)
steps.detail: Read packages/compose/src/index.ts and packages/workflow/src/index.ts. Compose has no YAML config (skills are static files). Workflow has DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_CONFIG + DEFAULT_SANDBOX_CONSTRAINTS as TS constants. Decide: do they need loadConfig at all?

steps.title: Migrate memory to @sffmc/shared
steps.detail: Replace local loadConfig (line 39) with `import { loadConfig } from "@sffmc/shared"`. Replace local PluginContext interface (line 17) with shared. Run `cd packages/memory && bun test`. Must stay 100% green.

steps.title: Migrate rules to @sffmc/shared
steps.detail: Same pattern. After migration, verify all 12 rules tests still pass (per packages/rules/src/index.test.ts).

steps.title: Migrate watchdog to @sffmc/shared
steps.detail: Special case: watchdog uses `String(ctx.config?.model || "...")` as fallback. Shared PluginContext must allow this. If not, add fallback in loadConfig or keep model resolution in plugin.

steps.title: Migrate max-mode + auto-max to @sffmc/shared
steps.detail: Both have similar shape, can be done in same commit. Run tests for both packages.

steps.title: Migrate compose + workflow (conditional)
steps.detail: If audit (step 5) shows they don't need loadConfig, just replace their local PluginContext type with shared one. No config loader needed.

steps.title: Run full pre-commit + sffmc_health on all changes
steps.detail: `bun test` (all 292 tests), `bun run typecheck`, `bun run scripts/run-health.ts`. All must pass.

steps.title: Restart sandbox :4200, verify all 10 plugins load
steps.detail: After each migration commit, restart sandbox and curl /config. Expect 10/10 SFFMC plugins loaded, 0 errors in journal.

steps.title: Update per-plugin READMEs to drop 'custom config' language
steps.detail: Each README has a Configuration section. If it now points to @sffmc/shared, update the link.

steps.title: CHANGELOG entry + tag v0.8.0
steps.detail: Root CHANGELOG: 'v0.8.0 — @sffmc/shared migration (7 plugins)'. Tag at the commit that includes all migration commits.

summary.bottleneck: step 8 (watchdog) — 35 min due to model-fallback edge case
